description:
Log in to Bahmni (User: superman, Pass: Admin123). Patient Amina Nyong'o (BAH000030) was admitted earlier today with community-acquired pneumonia. A trainee began the clinical record but made errors. The patient has a documented Penicillin allergy. Complete the care pathway:

1. Correct the patient's weight from the erroneously recorded 185 kg to 68 kg
2. Record the missing triage vitals: temperature 38.7 C, respiratory rate 24/min, SpO2 93%, blood pressure 100/65 mmHg
3. Discontinue the active Amoxicillin order (reason: Penicillin allergy contraindication) and prescribe a safe non-penicillin, non-cephalosporin antibiotic (e.g., Azithromycin or Levofloxacin)
4. Document diagnoses: Pneumonia as primary confirmed, Sepsis as secondary presumed
5. Record disposition as Admit Patient with note: ICU admission for sepsis management
6. Schedule a follow-up OPD appointment for 7 days from today
7. Write a clinical encounter note of at least 200 characters documenting the corrections and care plan

All actions must be on patient BAH000030.
